Research

Research interests spanning learning, optimization, vision, and intelligent systems.

Artificial Intelligence

Intelligent systems for real-world decision-making and automation.

intelligent systemsdecision supportautomation

Machine & Deep Learning

Learning methods, representation learning, and robust model development.

machine learningneural networksrepresentation learning

Metaheuristic Optimization

Nature-inspired optimization, including the Artificial Algae Algorithm.

AAAglobal optimizationfeature selection

Computer Vision

Medical image segmentation and visual data analysis.

image segmentationmedical imagingvision

Federated & Semi-supervised Learning

Privacy-aware and label-efficient collaborative learning.

federated learningprivacyfew labels

Industrial AI

Data science and decision-support systems for industrial applications.

data scienceoptimizationindustry
